{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Malachi's wife
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Malachi's wife]] is not a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Malachi's wife]] is in charge of his house and her [[Tree]] is considered practically undefended because she is not a [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
